synopsis: Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi - Redemption, originally titled Tales of the Jedi: The Redemption of Ulic Qel-Droma, is a Star Wars Legends comic book miniseries written by Kevin J. Anderson. It is the final miniseries in the Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi comic series, and it ran from July 22, 1998 to November 25, 1998, following the release of Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi - The Fall of the Sith Empire in 1997.
title: Tales of the Jedi: Redemption
